items.name: smooth-height
items.title: Smooth Height
items.description: A Motion-powered container that observes its content and smoothly animates between heights as it changes.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: A shadcn Button-based copy control that writes text to the clipboard and animates a copy → check icon swap.

items.name: status-button
items.title: Status Button
items.description: A shadcn Button-based action that transitions through idle, loading, and success states with Motion.

items.name: highlight-tabs
items.title: Highlight Tabs
items.description: A Motion-powered tab list with a shared highlight indicator, hover activation, focus activation, and arrow-key navigation.

items.name: animated-modal
items.title: Animated Modal
items.description: A Motion-powered shared layout modal that expands list items into an accessible dialog with overlay, Escape handling, and reduced-motion support.

items.name: context-cursor
items.title: Context Cursor
items.description: A scoped custom cursor for pointer-rich surfaces where each target can register its own label, icon, and interaction intent.

items.name: feedback
items.title: Feedback
items.description: A Motion-powered feedback popover that expands from a trigger, supports keyboard submission, and confirms receipt inline.

items.name: multi-step
items.title: Multi Step
items.description: A Motion-powered multi-step container that slides between steps and animates height as content changes.

items.name: orchestration
items.title: Orchestration
items.description: A CSS-powered staggered entrance primitive for orchestrating any list of children, cards, steps, rows, or search results.

items.name: use-reduced-motion
items.title: Use Reduced Motion
items.description: A client-safe React hook for reading prefers-reduced-motion, reacting to preference changes, and supporting scoped local overrides.
